name: Rhubarb-Pecan Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. In another bowl, beat the egg and vegetable oil. Stir in the orange juice.
3. Gradually add the wet mixture to the dry mixture.
4. Fold in the chopped pecans and rhubarb pieces.
5. Pour the batter into greased muffin cups.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
